## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production updates, and new workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposing a content strategy reset: pause production for a week to implement new workflows, AI SEO, and focus on higher quality, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Current backlog: 18 unpublished articles, 35 refreshed integration pages ready for review/upload](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [New features coming soon: FAQs and AI-generated images for content pages](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [AI SEO tool to be added as a beta feature without additional cost for now](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Reset

  - [Pause production for a week (targeting June 9th or week after) to:](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Implement new workflows and features](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Roll out AI SEO tool](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Conduct deep research and address cannibalization issues](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Propose reducing weekly article output from 20 to \~12, focusing on higher quality and targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Consider adding minor link building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### AI SEO Implementation

  - [GrowthX adding AI SEO tool as a beta feature without additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Tool helps prioritize content strategy and identify opportunities for citations/backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Plan to track 50-100 prompts, including awareness and evaluation stage queries](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Performance tied to prompt selection, similar to brand awareness metrics](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [18 articles currently in Strapi CMS backlog](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [10 integration pages and 12 articles in production queue](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Content performance showing a slight downward trend, but some articles starting to rank for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Theodore aims to publish 12 articles this week to reduce backlog](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [35 refreshed integration pages ready for review/upload](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Added more content, FAQs, and inline CTAs to existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [New process: drafts stored in Notion, then uploaded to Strapi CMS for review](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Image Implementation

  - [AI-generated images to be rolled out in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Manual upload process to Strapi media library](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Strapi automatically optimizes and generates URLs for uploaded images](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

### Metadata and SEO

  - [GrowthX workflow includes generation of:](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [Alt text for images](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [Meta titles and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [Social media tags](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
      - [Related blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [Categories and tags](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to share list of AI SEO prompts to track](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Theodore to publish \~12 articles this week to reduce backlog](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Theodore and Paul to divide workload for publishing articles and integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement new workflows and AI SEO tool in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Team to review and upload refreshed integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [GrowthX to roll out AI-generated images in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/wHyT-H5RyLKUzp-pvBEheaYVsRukmjf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
